$comment: Bump this file each time you ship a new APK build. The mobile app fetches it from GitHub Raw on Profile -> App updates. `apk_url` should point to the EAS-built APK (the Install link from expo.dev/builds/...). `changelog` lines render as bullet points.
changelog: Fixed taps not firing on the login screen
Made login + register much faster — dropped CDN sound preload from boot
Stopped the empty bottom sheet from opening when you swipe up from the bottom
Added this Updates page so you can grab new builds from inside the app
